task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Nuxeo web interface with the 'Contract Template' document open or selected in the directory structure (/default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template).

task_completion.description: Locate the active 'Serial Document Review' workflow assigned to 'jsmith'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the cancellation or abandonment of the workflow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the agent clicking an 'Abandon', 'Cancel', or similar termination button specifically for the 'Serial Document Review' workflow.

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow has been successfully cancelled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the document's workflow panel or status indicating that there are no active workflows, or a confirmation message stating the workflow was abandoned.

task_completion.description: Verify the document itself was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Contract Template' document is still present, accessible, and visible in its original workspace location after the workflow cancellation.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Nuxeo web GUI to cancel the workflow, not terminal commands or API requests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction within a web browser. No terminal windows, curl commands, or API testing tools (like Postman) should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo Platform application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Nuxeo Platform web UI, not a text editor, mock-up, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use database administration tools or backend scripts to alter the workflow state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database clients (e.g., pgAdmin, DBeaver) or backend server consoles are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is Nuxeo Platform. The target document 'Contract Template' is located at the path '/default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template'. The workflow to be cancelled is the built-in 'SerialDocumentReview' (typically displayed as 'Serial Document Review') and is currently assigned to the user 'jsmith'.
